author: y4rr
content: Implemented via commit b3b1b513. New ferrotorch_core::dispatch module with DispatchKey enum (Cpu/Cuda/Meta/Sparse/Quantized/Nested/Autocast/Autograd/Vmap/Profiler/Tracer in priority order), DispatchKeySet u16 bitmask with iter_desc for priority iteration, and Dispatcher<T> with register/call/call_direct. The Dispatcher walks active keys highest-first, picks the first registered kernel, and passes the full keyset to the kernel so it can mask itself off and redispatch to a lower layer. 18 tests including a three-layer Tracer → Autograd → Cpu chain that verifies ordered execution. 977 ferrotorch-core tests pass.
